description.zh: 狼、羊、白菜都想过河，可有些乘客不能被单独留下。挑选船客、规划往返，让每一座河岸始终安全；走错时，小剧场会替你把时间倒回来。
description.en: A wolf, a goat, and a cabbage all need to cross, but some passengers cannot be left alone together. Plan every outward and return trip, keep both banks safe, and let the story rewind when a crossing goes wrong.
